channel.title: Carreer on Fernando Simões
channel.description: Recent content in Carreer on Fernando Simões

item.title: Resources list
item.description: The List Post: Resources How and what resources I used to get in love with software development Here is a list of things that I did to help myself learn how to program. I tried to create a chronological narrative, so, besides the list of resources, you can also follow the progress of interests and curiosities that I had. From previous experiences, when I started I knew three things: I knew that I had to get myself totally immersed in this new reality (this means: getting to know the people, the literature, the vocabulary, the mental map of everything).
